# Streak Habit

> Build lasting habits, one streak at a time.

## Tech Stack
- **Language:** Kotlin
- **UI:** Jetpack Compose + Material 3
- **Architecture:** MVVM + Clean Architecture
- **DI:** Hilt
- **Database:** Room
- **Navigation:** Navigation Compose
- **Async:** Coroutines + Flow

## Package
`com.androidforge.streakhappit`

## Screens
- Habits Dashboard (Main Screen)
- Add/Edit Habit
- Habit Details & Progress
- Settings

## Setup
1. Clone this repo
2. Open in Android Studio
3. Replace AdMob IDs in Constants.kt
4. Build and run
